oily.summary: Your skin tends to produce excess sebum, which can lead to acne and shine.
oily.routine: Morning: Face Wash → Sunscreen. Night: Anti Acne Cream.

dry.summary: Your skin needs extra hydration and nourishment.
dry.routine: Morning: Moisturizer → Sunscreen. Night: Vitamin C Cream.

sensitive.summary: Your skin reacts easily — gentle, soothing products work best for you.
sensitive.routine: Morning: Moisturizer → Sunscreen. Night: Glowpar Cream. Always patch test new products.

combination.summary: Your T-zone is oily but cheeks may be dry or normal — a balanced routine is key.
combination.routine: Morning: Face Wash → Moisturizer → Sunscreen. Night: Vitamin C Serum.
